12. Ahmed Adeeb (October 24, 25)
13. Foreign Affairs (Denmark) (October 26)
14. Head of Government (Germany) (October 27)

<answer>Algirdas Butkevičius, South Africa, Angela Merkel, Tony Tan Keng Yam, Elizabeth II, Business (Taiwan), Nicos Anastasiades, Mainland Affairs Council, Davit Usupashvili, Head of Government (Cyprus), Japan, Ahmed Adeeb, Foreign Affairs (Denmark), and Head of Government (Germany) gave visits to China in October 2015.</answer>
